item.title: Done with week one - Sen. Deborah Krishnadasan
item.description: News article "Done with week one - Sen. Deborah Krishnadasan" from Senate Democrats.

item.title: 👍Sheri Sawyer - Office of Financial Management
item.description: Sheri Sawyer signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Office of Financial Management.

item.title: 👍Sophia Byrd McSherry - Deputy Director, Washington State Office of Public Defense
item.description: Sophia Byrd McSherry signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Deputy Director, Washington State Office of Public Defense.

item.title: Week Three: Property tax relief and bills are moving! - Sen. Deborah Krishnadasan
item.description: News article "Week Three: Property tax relief and bills are moving! - Sen. Deborah Krishnadasan" from Senate Democrats.

item.title: Minority; without recommendation.
item.description: Minority; without recommendation.

item.title: SGTE - Majority; 1st substitute bill be substituted, do pass.
item.description: SGTE - Majority; 1st substitute bill be substituted, do pass.

item.title: Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.
item.description: Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.

item.title: Placed on second reading by Rules Committee.
item.description: Placed on second reading by Rules Committee.

item.title: 1st substitute bill substituted.
item.description: 1st substitute bill substituted.

item.title: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
item.description: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.

item.title: Third reading, passed; yeas, 45; nays, 3; absent, 0; excused, 1.
item.description: Third reading, passed; yeas, 45; nays, 3; absent, 0; excused, 1.

item.title: 👍Sheri Sawyer - Office of Financial Management
item.description: Sheri Sawyer signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Office of Financial Management.

item.title: Referred to Appropriations.

item.title: SGOV - Executive action taken by committee.
item.description: SGOV - Executive action taken by committee.

item.title: SGOV - Majority; do pass with amendment(s).

item.title: 👍Sheri Sawyer - Office of Financial Management
item.description: Sheri Sawyer signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Office of Financial Management.

item.title: APP - Majority; do pass with amendment(s) but without amendment(s) by State Government & Tribal Relations.

item.description: Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.
